Changelog

  • New: Added server-managed settings support for enterprise admin console configuration
  • New: Built-in skill library with 3 bundled skills including /simplify and /commit
  • Fix: Resolved hook timeout edge case in Stop hook
  • Improvement: Enhanced CLAUDE_CODE_NEW_INIT flow with multi-phase interactive setup
  • New: Path-specific rule templates for common project types
  • Fix: Memory page rendering issue
  • New: Added /batch command for bulk file operations
  • Improvement: Better error messages for invalid tool calls
  • Fix: Session recovery on network timeout
  • New: Support for custom MCP servers in settings.json
  • Improvement: Faster file indexing on large repositories
